name: BrightRock Gold Corp.
summary: BrightRock Gold Corp. is engaged in the discovery, mining, exploration, production, and marketing of gold. It holds development rights for five small scale concessions at the Ofin River, as well as holds an option on the Rocks & Rivers large scale concession located in the Western Region, Ghana. The company was formerly known as Ghana Gold Corp. and changed its name to BrightRock Gold Corp. in November 2013. BrightRock Gold Corp. is based in Port St. Lucie, Florida.
